title: Tick Control in Irvington, NJ | $125 - $325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Irvington, NJ starting at $125. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Irvington, NJ residents face increasing tick populations in residential yards, parks, and wooded areas throughout the township. Our professional tick control services provide comprehensive protection for your property, targeting ticks at all life stages to reduce the risk of Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. With treatments ranging from $125 to $325, we offer effective solutions tailored to Irvington's unique environmental needs.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Irvington and the surrounding Essex County communities with EPA-approved tick treatments that are safe for children and pets. Our licensed technicians understand the local tick species prevalent in Irvington's parks and residential areas, providing targeted seasonal treatments and ongoing monitoring to keep your outdoor spaces safe year-round.
localContext: Irvington's tree-lined neighborhoods, proximity to Branch Brook Park Extension, and numerous single-family homes with yards create ideal habitats for deer ticks and dog ticks. Our tick control program is specifically designed for Irvington properties, from the historic homes near Clinton Avenue to the residential areas surrounding Irvington Park, ensuring comprehensive protection throughout the growing season.

faqs.question: What does tick control service in Irvington include?
faqs.answer: Our Irvington tick control service includes a thorough property inspection, targeted application of tick treatments to high-risk areas like tall grass, shrubs, and wooded borders, perimeter barrier protection, and follow-up treatments as needed. We focus on areas where ticks are most likely to harbor and where your family and pets spend time outdoors.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Irvington, NJ?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Irvington typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, ticks can be active during warmer winter days as well. We recommend starting treatments in early spring before tick populations explode and continuing with monthly or bi-monthly applications throughout the season for maximum protection.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my family and pets in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered tick control products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. Treatments typically require a 2-3 hour drying period before the treated area is safe for re-entry. We take extra precautions around children's play areas, vegetable gardens, and pet spaces to ensure complete safety.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Irvington, NJ?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in Irvington range from $125 to $325 depending on your property size, the severity of tick activity, and treatment frequency. Most residential properties fall in the $150-$225 range for a single treatment. We offer seasonal packages with multiple treatments that provide better value and more consistent protection throughout tick season.
